evidence_effect: hybrid causal-design authority only; no implementation-conformance, calibration, candidate/control outcome, L02 support/falsification, mode ranking, boundary rung, or terminal class

native_strengths: Native packets can jointly alter P coherence and retain exact attribution/audit rows.
emit_feedback_eligibility_surface_row accepts arbitrary nonempty front and rear node sequences and calculates front_mass as the sum of live coherence over every front node.
A native feedback front mask containing P and M_H therefore supplies one model-owned joint state/history-output read without a contributor address.
The native feedback producer owns polarity/threshold evaluation, response scheduling, idempotency, and the later packet transition.
Native v2 restoration identity covers P, M_H, response configuration, scheduler, logs, and the native reset baseline.
native_blockers: PyGRC has no active independently intervenable multi-event common-history carrier H_P.
Native route-local contact rows are passive evidence; native feedback is derived from the latest contact plus live node state rather than an ordered history fold.
LGRC-0 causal-history artifacts are annotation-only and non-mutating.
No admitted public native method appends, reorders, clamps, or resets active common history independently of P.
Native v2 identity cannot cover an ecology-owned active history or its cursor/intervention/reset baseline.

joint_native_read_finding.score_family: sum(live coherence at P and M_H) - live coherence at B_ref - reference_delta
joint_native_read_finding.latest_contact_role: common neutral eligibility trigger and audit/lineage source only; it is not a state/history selector or score input

rejected_shortcuts.shortcut: Treat P alone as the hybrid pool.
rejected_shortcuts.reason: That is the accepted state-carried profile and contains no active-history component.

rejected_shortcuts.shortcut: Treat M_H alone as the hybrid pool.
rejected_shortcuts.reason: That is the history output port and omits causal encounter state.

rejected_shortcuts.shortcut: Treat native packet logs or latest-contact digest as the history component.
rejected_shortcuts.reason: Those remain passive/audit or controller-addressed latest-row identity, not independently intervenable active history.

rejected_shortcuts.shortcut: Compute P plus history plus success inside an RCAE controller.
rejected_shortcuts.reason: That would collapse the pool and response into one controller-carried scalar and violate producer minimality.

realization_selection.component_reuse_rule: Reuse the pre-runtime structural adapter class only. I03B fixture coefficient, amounts, times, thresholds, branch IDs, response observations, comparator, and evidence digests are prohibited I03C inputs.
realization_selection.selection_rationale: The adapter supplies only active H_P, its cursor/interventions, deterministic R_H, and public native M_H materialization. PyGRC already owns causal state C_P=P, the joint P/M_H live-state read, every coherence mutation, threshold/polarity evaluation, later response schedule, and packet transition.
realization_selection.reclassification_trigger: If the adapter must read P as a success input, compute the joint score, apply the response threshold, schedule the later response, or if P/H_P cannot be independently intervened and restored, stop as missing_prerequisite.

S1.hybrid_rule: native arrival changes P and supplies one physical H_P token; source label remains audit-only

S2.hybrid_rule: distinct attributable contribution with no contributor slot in H_P or V

P.hybrid_rule: causal state component read exactly once in the joint front mask and independently altered by native state intervention

H_P.hybrid_rule: ordered source-label-free physical token sequence independently intervenable from P

M_H.hybrid_rule: deterministic R_H output/cache read exactly once beside P in the joint native front mask; not the complete pool alone

E.hybrid_rule: scheduled after every final P/H_P/M_H intervention; neither contact identity nor contributor order selects the joint response

q.definition: registered physical contribution represented by one native arrival to P and one canonical H_P token derived from that same admitted row
causal_native_fields: contact amount transferred into P coherence
arrival order/time used by the active-history token schema
forbidden_causal_fields: source node identity as a readout value

U_S.state_transition: C_P(k+1) = C_P(k) + native positive arrival amount q_k
U_S.independent_intervention: public native P-to-K_P debit or later registered native balancing path; H_P/M_H frozen

U_H.input_authority: read-only unseen registered native arrival-to-P rows
U_H.admission_rule: route-local packet arrival; target P; source in registered source set; unseen log suffix and surface digest
U_H.i03br1_route_obligation: I06 must retain a unique registered source-to-P path or add explicit route/channel admission
U_H.idempotency_rule: cursor/surface digests gate admission only and never enter R_H or V

R_H.definition: source-label-invariant deterministic ordered fold r_0=0; r_(j+1)=lambda*r_j+physical_amount_j with 0<lambda<1
R_H.causal_role: history-component output operation, not the joint score or scientific response
R_H.conformance_values: must be separately frozen and mechanically rejected from I04/I06

M_H.materialization: adapter requests only public native balancing packets to make M_H coherence equal R_H(H_P)
M_H.adapter_ownership: delta calculation and public packet schedule request
M_H.native_ownership: all reservoir/sink transport and coherence mutation
M_H.cache_rule: must equal R_H before V and remains insufficient identity without H_P/configuration

L.definition: native packet/event/contact/lineage records retaining attribution, route, row digest, packet identity, proper/event time, and scheduler order

V.joint_read: front mask contains P and M_H exactly once each; rear mask contains B_ref exactly once; score uses live front/rear coherence
V.joint_family: J(C_P,R_H) = C_P + R_H at the native live-state mask; nonlinearity is not required
V.history_guard: expected_source_surface_digest is null and a common neutral contact follows all component interventions
V.later_transition: native feedback producer evaluates the joint score/threshold and schedules the native A-to-B packet

prohibited_inputs_or_actions: calling P alone, M_H alone, or a latest-row digest hybrid
source-lineage or contributor-indexed slots in H_P or V
one controller calculating P plus H_P plus success
RCAE adapter reading P for threshold/success or reading A/B response state
RCAE adapter invoking feedback/producer or scheduling A-to-B response
reading both private state/history pairs in one legitimate private response
forbidden_G.failure_effect: Any prohibited read/action reclassifies the realization as controller/mailbox carried or missing_prerequisite.

producer_boundary.single_missing_operation: maintain/intervene on one active ordered common history and materialize its deterministic native output port
allowed_calls: compute R_H from physical source-label-free tokens
request public native M_H balancing packets
invoke registered native step calls to process those packets
forbidden_calls_or_reads: read P as a joint-success input
read B, scientific response, success, or claim fields
compute P plus M_H or apply the response threshold
call feedback emission, producer configuration, or produce_events
producer_boundary.handoff: The adapter stops after M_H materialization. PyGRC reads P and M_H jointly and owns the later response.
producer_boundary.naturalization_debt: First-class active history and its intervention/restoration surfaces remain absent; the joint multi-node live-state feedback read is already native.

state_only_intervention.mechanism: after registered contributions, H_P admission, and M_H materialization, apply a native P-only debit/balance while H_P/M_H remain fixed; then apply the common neutral contact
held_fixed: B_ref, support, response configuration, and opportunity
state_only_intervention.allowed_difference: P coherence and explicit native intervention audit
state_only_intervention.expected_relation: joint score/later response changes under the later frozen resolution rule

history_only_intervention.mechanism: after identical native contributions, replace/clamp H_P and rematerialize M_H while preserving P; then apply the common neutral contact
held_fixed: B_ref, support, response configuration, and opportunity
history_only_intervention.allowed_difference: H_P/R_H/M_H, balancing packets, and explicit intervention identity
history_only_intervention.expected_relation: joint score/later response changes under the later frozen resolution rule

joint_contrast.mechanism: compare the fully constituted P+H_P branch with matched branches in which only P or only H_P/M_H is reduced/clamped
joint_contrast.required_relation: both one-component interventions affect the same native joint score/response; neither P alone nor M_H alone is called the hybrid pool

history_order_shuffle.mechanism: preserve marginal token multiset and final P while reversing physical arrival order; H_P/R_H/M_H may differ
history_order_shuffle.expected_relation: the hybrid response tracks the history-derived component while P remains matched

write_diversion.mechanism: preserve source debits but divert packets away from P, preventing both common state accumulation and H_P admission
write_diversion.expected_relation: both components remain/reference-reset and the joint response follows reference

label_permutation.expected_relation: P, H_P, R_H, M_H, joint score, and later response remain invariant; audit identity changes

common_access_witness.common_pool_identity: P plus H_P with its M_H output-port binding
common_access_witness.native_read_port: one feedback front mask containing P and M_H exactly once each
common_access_witness.eligible_responder_rule: Any registered A-role node with native reserve/route adequacy may use the same P/M_H/B_ref mask and native feedback policy class.

private_partition_competitor.construction: S1 contributes only to private native P1 and H1/M_H1; S2 contributes only to private native P2 and H2/M_H2. Each legitimate response reads one private pair [P_i,M_Hi] only.
required_guards: separate adapter instances and output nodes
no shared reducer or adapter state
no response mask contains both private pairs
no helper/dispatcher compares or chooses between pairs
private_partition_competitor.interpretation: A controller may reproduce a numerical output, but absent the registered common P+H_P read it cannot satisfy R04. Private numerical failure is not required.

logical_cells.hybrid_projection: reference P, reference/empty H_P and M_H, common neutral contact, and no response relation
S1-only and S2-only native P plus one-token H_P components; neither is assumed sufficient
both contributions constitute one P and one H_P; registered orders preserve final P but may alter R_H/M_H
history order/clamp changes H_P/M_H with P held; state-only branch changes P with H_P/M_H held
delete/divert either contribution and retain honest changes to both state and history components
private P1+H1 and P2+H2 reads, label controls, and direct/controller bypass remain separate from the common joint read
alternate eligible responder uses the same common P/M_H/B_ref native mask; exact scientific contrast remains later work

lane_controls.name: each contributor alone
lane_controls.expected_relation: one-source P+one-token H histories remain visible; neither is assumed to explain the combined relation
lane_controls.allowed_ambiguity: one source may produce a lower-level response under later resolution
lane_controls.fail_closed_effect: full explanation by an original single-source component pair blocks R03

lane_controls.name: contributor deletion and label permutation
lane_controls.expected_relation: deletion changes P and H_P; pure label permutation changes neither causal component nor response
lane_controls.allowed_ambiguity: deletion magnitude waits for I04 resolution
lane_controls.fail_closed_effect: label sensitivity blocks R04; no deletion relation blocks affected R02/R03

lane_controls.name: hybrid component separation
lane_controls.target: separate state and history causal dependence
lane_controls.expected_relation: P-only intervention with H_P/M_H fixed and H_P-only intervention with P fixed each alter the same joint response relation
lane_controls.fail_closed_effect: invariance to either component blocks hybrid classification

lane_controls.name: private-mailbox and controller substitution
lane_controls.expected_relation: legitimate private branches read one private state/history pair only; an output-matched controller lacks the common P+H_P-to-V path
lane_controls.allowed_ambiguity: numerical output equivalence alone is non-diagnostic
lane_controls.fail_closed_effect: private aggregation or causal indistinguishability from bypass blocks R04

lane_controls.name: component freeze with contributor activity preserved
held_fixed: source-side native debits and marginal quantities
lane_controls.expected_relation: write diversion prevents both common components; explicit one-component interventions change only their named component and the joint response follows it
lane_controls.fail_closed_effect: no separable component dependence blocks hybrid R03/R04

operational_projections.hybrid_binding: two attributable native contributions jointly constitute one P and one H_P, and V reads both through one native common mask
V depends jointly on live P and H_P-derived M_H; exact later-response field remains I04
arbitrary label permutation changes audit identity but not either component or V
independent native P and active H_P interventions separately alter the joint response relation
one-source component pairs are registered insufficient-repetition alternatives; exact comparator selection remains I04
separate private P1/H1 and P2/H2 pairs cannot satisfy the common joint read without forbidden aggregation
controller/direct-address output without the registered P+H_P/M_H path is causally insufficient
hybrid order sensitivity may change H_P/M_H while final P is matched; P-only and H-only interventions bind both components
alternate eligible responders may access the same P/M_H/B_ref mask; R05 remains unresolved

pool_economy_dispositions.native_state_reserve: P and native reservoirs/sinks use conserved packet/coherence transport
pool_economy_dispositions.history_depletion: explicit whole-history replacement/clamp only; no autonomous deletion
pool_economy_dispositions.history_saturation: not selected and not applicable to I03C conformance
pool_economy_dispositions.history_leakage: not applicable; lambda is order weighting rather than wall-time decay
pool_economy_dispositions.i06_obligation: bound branch/event counts and retain these lifecycle classes or introduce a separately reviewed construction
pool_economy_dispositions.claim_boundary: No resource economy, memory capacity, communication, agency, organism, or regime claim follows.

native_coverage: complete packet/surface logs, producer configuration, scheduler, and queue
restoration_profile_proposal.external_reset_baseline: complete adapter baseline persisted beside native baseline
restoration_profile_proposal.joint_binding: versioned identity over P role, H_P carrier, M_H output, exact [P,M_H]/[B_ref] response masks, private/common partition, admission/lifecycle rules, and fixture or registration identity
restoration_profile_proposal.composite_identity_rule: canonical SHA-256 over native v2, complete adapter current/reset identity, and joint experiment binding
restoration_profile_proposal.save_load_policy: manifest-coordinate native and adapter snapshots; validate component hashes and complete composite before continuation
restoration_profile_proposal.reset_policy: invoke native and adapter reset only as one registered paired procedure, then validate the initial composite; one-sided reset and implicit rebase forbidden
restoration_profile_proposal.equal_input_continuation_requirement: original/load/reset branches receive identical adapter calls, native schedules, neutral contacts, producer calls, and continuation inputs

missing_native_patterns_for_later_synthe: active common-history carrier spanning multiple committed contacts
source-label-free token schema and ordered reducer
common/private history partition identity and no-common-read guards
native_positive_pattern_retained: multi-node live-state feedback masks already provide a native joint state/output read; the hybrid mode does not create a new demand for a controller-authored joint-score primitive
deferred_to_i04: one exact hybrid raw later-response field and orientation
scientific component combination parameters, token values/timing, native threshold, and response amount
deferred_to_i06: exact node, edge, role, carrier, and unique admission-route identities
exact topology, native initial state/reserves, and adapter baseline
exact event/scheduler order and bounded branch/event capacity
exact token operation registry and contribution admission bindings
exact P/M_H/B_ref masks, neutral contact, response route, and producer policy
complete cell/control/subconfiguration matrix and branch-point identities
exact alternate eligible responder and private partitions

allowed_runtime_scope: native contributions jointly advance P and adapter H_P
joint native feedback reads P and M_H exactly once each
independent P-only and H_P-only interventions affect the joint path
history order and arbitrary label controls
private no-common-joint-read and alternate access guards
composite save/load/reset identity and equal-input continuation
